Season 2026 • Registration Open

Cyber Guardians Society

Capture The Flag Competition

Test your cybersecurity skills against the best. Solve challenges, capture flags, climb the leaderboard.

View ChallengesLeaderboard

Features

WAF Protection

Advanced Web Application Firewall detecting SQLi, XSS, command injection, path traversal, and encoded payloads

Rate Limiting

Per-endpoint rate limits with escalating penalties and IP-based quotas for auth, admin, and submission endpoints

Anomaly Detection

JSON structure abuse, method enumeration, path probing, parameter pollution, and endpoint hammering detection

Bot Detection

Rate analysis, path scraping detection, scanner UA fingerprinting for acunetix, sqlmap, nessus and more

IP Quarantine & Blacklist

Auto-quarantine high-risk IPs with manual block/unblock/whitelist controls

CSRF Protection

HMAC-based tokens on all admin mutating endpoints validated server-side

Input Sanitization

Strips HTML tags, encodes special chars on all POST/PUT/PATCH body and query params

Account Lockout

Progressive delays with CAPTCHA at 3 failures and lockout at 5 failures per IP

Immutable Audit Log

SHA256 chain-hash linking every log entry with integrity verification

Fingerprint Anti-Sharing

SHA256 device fingerprinting per user detecting multiple fingerprints per account

Body Size Limit

100 KB limit for requests, 50 MB for file uploads with 413 rejection

CORS Validation

Validates Origin/Referer against allowed origins, blocks cross-origin mutating requests

Categories

🔐

Cryptography

Break ciphers and decode secrets

🌐

Web Exploitation

Hack web applications and APIs

⚙️

Reverse Engineering

Decompile and analyze binaries

🔍

Forensics

🎲

Miscellaneous

Cyber Guardians Society

Empowering the next generation of cybersecurity professionals through competitive CTF challenges.
